revision.comment: moved [[Template:Commonscat-inline]] to [[Template:Commons category-inline]]: space and complete words
Adding {{sec link auto}} so we get secure links when using the secure server, see [[WT:SEC#Sister project links]]. And adding whitespace stripping.
revision.text:
<!-- {{#if:x|}} strips whitespace. -->
{{#ifeq: {{{bullet|}}} | none
| 
| * 
}}[[Image:commons-logo.svg|12px|link=|alt=]] Media related to {{sec link auto| commons | Category:{{#if:x| {{{1| {{PAGENAME}} }}} }} | {{{2| {{{1| {{PAGENAME}} }}} }}} }} at [[Wikimedia Commons]]<noinclude>

{{pp-template}}
{{documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

another category deleted per [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2017 January 25]]
don't add userpages into Category:Commons category template with no category set
New version from sandbox: using commons sitelinks, redoing tracking categories, and other changes - see [[Template_talk:Commons_category#Please_test_a_new_version_of_this_template]] for discussion.
revision.text:
{{sister-inline | short={{{short|}}} | project=commonscat | list={{{list|}}} | extratext={{{extratext|}}} | links=[[commons:<!-- Check for a locally-specified category -->{{#if:{{{1|}}} | Category:{{{1|}}} <!-- ... or use Wikidata -->|{{if then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB |getCommonsLink|qid={{{qid|}}}|onlycat=True}}<!-- ... or fall back to the page name --> |Category:{{PAGENAME}} }} }}<!-- Now define the display title -->|{{{2|{{#if:{{{1|}}} | {{{1|}}} <!-- -->|{{if then show|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{#invoke:WikidataIB |getCommonsLink|qid={{{qid|}}}|onlycat=True}}|Category:|}}<!-- --> |{{PAGENAME}} }} }} }}}]] }}<!--
End of the template code, now add relevant tracking categories
--><includeonly>{{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}}||{{ns:14}}=<!-- Only add tracking categories to articles and categories. -->{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#ifeq:Category:{{{1|}}}|{{#invoke:WikidataIB |getCommonsLink|qid={{{qid|}}}|onlycat=True}}|<!-- -->[[Category:Commons category link is on Wikidata]]<!--
-->|{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|{{PAGENAME}}|<!-- ... the local parameter is the same as the local pagename, but not the same as on Wikidata -->[[Category:Commons category link is defined as the pagename]]<!--
... the local parameter does not match either of these -->|[[Category:Commons category link is locally defined]]}} }}<!--
We don't have a locally-defined link -->|{{#if:{{#invoke:WikidataIB |getCommonsLink|qid={{{qid|}}}|onlycat=True}}|<!--
... so we're using Wikidata -->[[Category:Commons category link from Wikidata]]<!--
... or we've fallen back to the pagename -->|[[Category:Commons category link is the pagename]]}} }} }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: tracking category fix for when _ is used rather than spaces
revision.text:
{{sister-inline | short={{{short|}}} | project=commonscat | list={{{list|}}} | extratext={{{extratext|}}} | links=[[commons:<!-- Check for a locally-specified category -->{{#if:{{{1|}}} | Category:{{{1|}}} <!-- ... or use Wikidata -->|{{if then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB |getCommonsLink|qid={{{qid|}}}|onlycat=True}}<!-- ... or fall back to the page name --> |Category:{{PAGENAME}}}}}}<!-- Now define the display title -->|{{{2|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1|}}}<!-- -->|{{if then show|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{#invoke:WikidataIB |getCommonsLink|qid={{{qid|}}}|onlycat=True}}|Category:|}}<!-- -->|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}}]] }}<!--
End of the template code, now add relevant tracking categories

don't add userpages into Category:Commons category template with no category set
New version from sandbox: using commons sitelinks, redoing tracking categories, and other changes - see [[Template_talk:Commons_category#Please_test_a_new_version_of_this_template]] for discussion.
revision.text:
{{sister-inline | short={{{short|}}} | project=commonscat | list={{{list|}}} | extratext={{{extratext|}}} | links=[[commons:<!-- Check for a locally-specified category -->{{#if:{{{1|}}} | Category:{{{1|}}} <!-- ... or use Wikidata -->|{{if then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB |getCommonsLink|qid={{{qid|}}}|onlycat=True}}<!-- ... or fall back to the page name --> |Category:{{PAGENAME}} }} }}<!-- Now define the display title -->|{{{2|{{#if:{{{1|}}} | {{{1|}}} <!-- -->|{{if then show|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{#invoke:WikidataIB |getCommonsLink|qid={{{qid|}}}|onlycat=True}}|Category:|}}<!-- --> |{{PAGENAME}} }} }} }}}]] }}<!--
End of the template code, now add relevant tracking categories
--><includeonly>{{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}}||{{ns:14}}=<!-- Only add tracking categories to articles and categories. -->{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#ifeq:Category:{{{1|}}}|{{#invoke:WikidataIB |getCommonsLink|qid={{{qid|}}}|onlycat=True}}|<!-- -->[[Category:Commons category link is on Wikidata]]<!--
-->|{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|{{PAGENAME}}|<!-- ... the local parameter is the same as the local pagename, but not the same as on Wikidata -->[[Category:Commons category link is defined as the pagename]]<!--
... the local parameter does not match either of these -->|[[Category:Commons category link is locally defined]]}} }}<!--
We don't have a locally-defined link -->|{{#if:{{#invoke:WikidataIB |getCommonsLink|qid={{{qid|}}}|onlycat=True}}|<!--
... so we're using Wikidata -->[[Category:Commons category link from Wikidata]]<!--
... or we've fallen back to the pagename -->|[[Category:Commons category link is the pagename]]}} }} }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: moved [[Template:Commonscat-inline]] to [[Template:Commons category-inline]]: space and complete words
Adding {{sec link auto}} so we get secure links when using the secure server, see [[WT:SEC#Sister project links]]. And adding whitespace stripping.

<!-- {{#if:x|}} strips whitespace. -->
{{#ifeq: {{{bullet|}}} | none
| 
| *

{{pp-template}}

</noinclude>

Deleted category per [[Wikipedia :Categories for discussion/Log/2017 January 25]]
another category deleted per [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2017 January 25]]
don't add userpages into Category:Commons category template with no category set
New version from sandbox: using commons sitelinks, redoing tracking categories, and other changes - see [[Template_talk:Commons_category#Please_test_a_new_version_of_this_template]] for discussion.
revision.text:
{{sister-inline | short={{{short|}}} | project=commonscat | list={{{list|}}} | extratext={{{extratext|}}} | links=[[commons:<!-- Check for a locally-specified category -->{{#if:{{{1|}}} | Category:{{{1|}}} <!-- ... or use Wikidata -->|{{if then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB |getCommonsLink|qid={{{qid|}}}|onlycat=True}}<!-- ... or fall back to the page name --> |Category:{{PAGENAME}} }} }}<!-- Now define the display title -->|{{{2|{{#if:{{{1|}}} | {{{1|}}} <!-- -->|{{if then show|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{#invoke:WikidataIB |getCommonsLink|qid={{{qid|}}}|onlycat=True}}|Category:|}}<!-- --> |{{PAGENAME}} }} }} }}}]] }}<!--
End of the template code, now add relevant tracking categories
--><includeonly>{{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}}||{{ns:14}}=<!-- Only add tracking categories to articles and categories. -->{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#ifeq:Category:{{{1|}}}|{{#invoke:WikidataIB |getCommonsLink|qid={{{qid|}}}|onlycat=True}}|<!-- -->[[Category:Commons category link is on Wikidata]]<!--
-->|{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|{{PAGENAME}}|<!-- ... the local parameter is the same as the local pagename, but not the same as on Wikidata -->[[Category:Commons category link is defined as the pagename]]<!--
... the local parameter does not match either of these -->|[[Category:Commons category link is locally defined]]}} }}<!--
We don't have a locally-defined link -->|{{#if:{{#invoke:WikidataIB |getCommonsLink|qid={{{qid|}}}|onlycat=True}}|<!--
... so we're using Wikidata -->[[Category:Commons category link from Wikidata]]<!--
... or we've fallen back to the pagename -->|[[Category:Commons category link is the pagename]]}} }} }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Changing tracking category logic so that we only use the P373 cases where we have actually fallen back to P373, rather than using the local text. No change to the display of the category links.
